name: web-search
label: Brave Web Search
description: Search the web for current information. Returns URLs, titles, and snippets.

name: url-fetch
label: Jina URL Fetcher
description: Fetch any URL and return clean Markdown text. Handles anti-bot pages via headless browser.

name: code-run
label: Piston Code Sandbox
description: Execute code in a secure sandbox. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Go, Rust, and more.
